title: Prepare and use a bee smoker
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and use a bee smoker demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare bee smoker for use

pcs.text: Identify the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Assess the climatic and other conditions that permit the use of smoker and adjust planned activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the climatic and other conditions that permit the use of smoker and adjust planned activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the climatic and other conditions that permit the use of smoker and adjust planned activities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check bee smoker for serviceability and  ensure any faults are rectified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check bee smoker for serviceability and  ensure any faults are rectified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check bee smoker for serviceability and  ensure any faults are rectified.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks associated with the use of a bee smoker and apply control measures according to health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks associated with the use of a bee smoker and apply control measures according to health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks associated with the use of a bee smoker and apply control measures according to health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Ensure an adequate water supply and tools available for fire control according to regulations and workplace fire prevention procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure an adequate water supply and tools available for fire control according to regulations and workplace fire prevention procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure an adequate water supply and tools available for fire control according to regulations and workplace fire prevention procedures.

pcs.text: Assess defensive behaviour of bees by considering weather conditions, nectar flow and strain of bee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess defensive behaviour of bees by considering weather conditions, nectar flow and strain of bee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess defensive behaviour of bees by considering weather conditions, nectar flow and strain of bee.

pcs.text: Prepare the bee smoker with suitable fuel and ignite according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the bee smoker with suitable fuel and ignite according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the bee smoker with suitable fuel and ignite according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Operate bee smoker bellows to produce and maintain smoke according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate bee smoker bellows to produce and maintain smoke according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate bee smoker bellows to produce and maintain smoke according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare bee smoker for use

elements.title: Use bee smoker to manage bees

pcs.text: Direct smoke into hive using the bellows and allow sufficient time for its effect according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Direct smoke into hive using the bellows and allow sufficient time for its effect according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Direct smoke into hive using the bellows and allow sufficient time for its effect according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use the smoker on hive and monitor its effect to maintain control of bees according to their behaviour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use the smoker on hive and monitor its effect to maintain control of bees according to their behaviour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use the smoker on hive and monitor its effect to maintain control of bees according to their behaviour.

pcs.text: Ensure the smoker remains alight and within easy reach when in use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure the smoker remains alight and within easy reach when in use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the smoker remains alight and within easy reach when in use.

pcs.text: Ensure the smoker is used and extinguished safely according to operating instructions and workplace fire prevention procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure the smoker is used and extinguished safely according to operating instructions and workplace fire prevention procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the smoker is used and extinguished safely according to operating instructions and workplace fire prevention procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Use bee smoker to manage bees
